creator: catone@cpan.org
text:
On Thu, Nov 4, 2010 at 16:10, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of textproc/pootle,
>
> Please note that PR ports/151933 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> Â  Â http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/151933
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Thank you for patch. Looks like mr mo files are missing from Pootle
distribution in this release. Updated patch attached.

-- 
Regards, Denis.
